description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to master and tags starting with 'v', and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-11. For each OS, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, and then build wheels using cibuildwheel. Install dependencies, handle OS-specific builds, and upload the resulting wheels and sdist as artifacts. If the workflow is triggered by a tag, upload the wheels as a release.
